## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] No real PII/PHI anywhere (synthetic fixtures only)
- [ ] `cargo fmt` + `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean (Rust)
- [ ] `cargo test` / `pytest` passing; new behavior is tested
- [ ] No new `unwrap`/`expect`/`panic!`/`todo!` in production code
- [ ] Docs / spec updated if a public interface or the sealed format changed
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
